text: Sampling design
Monthly low-tide quadrat surveys across 8 Puget Sound sites, Oct 2025 to Aug 2026.
Decide where QA/QC workflow lives (methods vs appendix)
Diversity findings
Shannon and Simpson indices computed for all sites; warming correlates with shifts in community composition.
Add 2025 baseline as a dashed line so the comparison reads at a glance (per Dr. Lindström).
Disturbance framework for community regulation; cite in intro framing.
